marketing.heroTitle: Run your school with clarity and confidence
marketing.heroSubtitle: FOBS SMS brings enrollment, attendance, marks, report cards and parent communication into one calm, dependable platform — built for Cameroonian schools.
marketing.feature1Body: Register students, manage classes and sections, and import rosters in seconds.
marketing.feature2Body: Enter marks per sequence and generate GCE- and MINESEC-ready report cards.
marketing.feature3Body: Track attendance and keep parents informed on their child's progress.
